This is the factored Cohen-Meisl linear autocatalytic form. It:
- Has basal nucleation (c0) + linear autocatalysis (c1*x2) 
- Modulated by experimental parameter (1 + c2*x1)
- Saturates at x2=1 via (1-x2)
- Is globally smooth, no singularities, 3 constants, complexity=16

The current parent failed with log-based Gompertz (non-finite derivatives). The fix is straightforward: replace with the proven best structure.
